sentences.target: Ich finde keinen Platz im Speisewagen.

translations.de: Ich finde keinen Platz im Speisewagen.
translations.en: I can't find a seat in the dining car.
translations.es: No encuentro sitio en el vagón restaurante.
translations.fr: Je ne trouve pas de place dans le wagon-restaurant.
translations.it: Non trovo posto nel vagone ristorante.
translations.ru: Я не могу найти место в вагоне-ресторане.
translations.pt: Não encontro lugar no vagão restaurante.
translations.he: אני לא מוצא מקום בקרון המסעדה.
translations.vi: Tôi không tìm được chỗ ngồi ở toa ăn.
translations.ar: لا أجد مقعدًا في عربة المطعم.
translations.nl: Ik kan geen plek vinden in de restauratiewagen.
translations.uk: Я не можу знайти місце у вагоні-ресторані.
translations.hi: मुझे डाइनिंग कार में सीट नहीं मिल रही है.
translations.pl: Nie mogę znaleźć miejsca w wagonie restauracyjnym.
translations.nb: Jeg finner ikke plass i restaurantvognen.
translations.id: Saya tidak menemukan tempat duduk di gerbong makan.
translations.sv: Jag hittar ingen plats i restaurangvagnen.
translations.cs: Nemůžu najít místo v jídelním voze.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke finde plads i spisevognen.
translations.ja: 食堂車で席が見つからない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selects an accusative object.
Negative determiner, masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Platz' and negates its existence.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'finde'.
Preposition contracted with definite article ('in' + 'dem'); introduces a dative locative phrase.
Compound common noun (Speise + Wagen), masculine; dative singular as the object of 'im' (locative).

translations.en: We're meeting in the dining car.
translations.es: Nos vemos en el vagón restaurante.
translations.fr: On se retrouve dans le wagon-restaurant.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ở toa ăn.
translations.nl: We spreken af in de restauratiewagen.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; used reflexively here ('sich treffen') meaning mutual meeting.
Reflexive personal pronoun, 1st person plural, accusative; direct object of 'treffen' indicating mutual action.
Preposition contracted with definite article ('in' + 'dem'); introduces a dative locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as the complement of 'im' specifying location.

translations.en: The train has no dining car.
translations.es: El tren no tiene vagón restaurante.
translations.fr: Le train n'a pas de wagon-restaurant.
translations.it: Il treno non ha un vagone ristorante.
translations.pt: O trem não tem vagão restaurante.
translations.ar: لا يوجد في القطار عربة مطعم.
translations.hi: इस ट्रेन में डाइनिंग कार नहीं है.
translations.pl: W tym pociągu nie ma wagonu restauracyjnego.
translations.id: Kereta ini tidak punya gerbong makan.
translations.ja: その列車には食堂車がない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of 'Zug'.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular serving as the subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an accusative object to express possession.
Negative determiner, masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Speisewagen' to negate possession.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'hat'.

sentences.target: Ich hole mir Kaffee im Speisewagen.

translations.de: Ich hole mir Kaffee im Speisewagen.
translations.en: I'm getting coffee in the dining car.
translations.es: Voy por un café al vagón restaurante.
translations.fr: Je vais prendre un café au wagon-restaurant.
translations.it: Vado a prendere un caffè nel vagone ristorante.
translations.pt: Vou pegar um café no vagão restaurante.
translations.he: אני הולך לקחת קפה בקרון המסעדה.
translations.vi: Tôi ra toa ăn lấy cà phê.
translations.ar: سأذهب لأشتري قهوة في عربة المطعم.
translations.nl: Ik ga koffie halen in de restauratiewagen.
translations.uk: Я піду за кавою у вагон-ресторан.
translations.hi: मैं डाइनिंग कार में कॉफ़ी लेने जा रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Idę po kawę do wagonu restauracyjnego.
translations.el: Πάω να πάρω καφέ στο βαγόνι-εστιατόριο.
translations.nb: Jeg går og henter kaffe i restaurantvognen.
translations.id: Saya pergi ambil kopi di gerbong makan.
translations.sv: Jag går och hämtar kaffe i restaurangvagnen.
translations.ro: Merg să iau o cafea la vagonul-restaurant.
translations.cs: Jdu si pro kávu do jídelního vozu.
translations.da: Jeg går hen og henter kaffe i spisevognen.
translations.ja: 食堂車でコーヒーを買ってくる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, with a dative reflexive beneficiary ('mir') and an accusative direct object ('Kaffee').
Reflexive/benefactive personal pronoun, 1st person singular, dative; indirect object indicating beneficiary.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as the direct object; bare noun (no article) indicating an indefinite quantity.
Preposition contracted with definite article ('in' + 'dem'); introduces a dative locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as the complement of 'im' specifying location.
